bbc.title: More US Marines and warships to be moved to Middle East, reports say
bbc.description: The reinforcements will come from an amphibious ready group that is usually based in Japan, an official told CBS, the BBC's US partner.

bbc.description: A group of fighters based in Iraq say they are "ready to go home", as they face drone attacks from Tehran.

bbc.description: Security had been increased at Jewish public institutions following an earlier incident in Rotterdam.

bbc.title: Los Angeles asks for investigation into LA28 Olympics chief over Epstein ties
bbc.description: The LA city council voted unanimously for an investigation into LA28 chief Casey Wasserman over his Epstein ties.

bbc.title: Charges dropped against Georgia teens whose teacher died during toilet paper prank
bbc.description: The teacher's family had asked for charges, including one of homicide, to be dropped "to prevent a separate tragedy from occuring" over the prank turned fatal.

bbc.title: Family of Michigan synagogue suspect killed in Lebanon airstrike, officials say
bbc.description: The FBI said the suspect had large quantities of fireworks and petrol in his vehicle when it caught fire after ramming a synagogue on Thursday.

bbc.title: Ukraine and allies fear easing Russian sanctions will prolong war
bbc.description: Ukraine's president says the US decision "certainly does not help achieve peace".

wsj.title: Palestinians Stream Back to Northern Gaza on Foot

wsj.title: Suspected Sabotage of Deep-Sea Cable Triggers First NATO-Led Response
wsj.description: The alliance mounted its first coordinated response to a suspected sabotage campaign against critical infrastructure after another cable was severed in the Baltic Sea.

wsj.title: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Enter Congo's Safe-Haven City
wsj.description: Residents of Goma reported gunfire and shelling after rebels overran Congolese troops. U.N. officials estimated that more than one million displaced people were now inside the city.

wsj.title: Cocaine-Funded Gangs Shake Colombia Years After Peace Pact
wsj.description: Attacks by powerful militias against civilians reflect the state’s inaction eight years after a peace accord removed a powerful rebel group from the field.

wsj.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
wsj.description: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
